briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — NASDAQ +0.2%, S&P 500 +0.3% — with no directional conviction. Despite holding $677 in cash with 4 open slots, strategy memory is clear: neutral days are not the time to force deployment. PLBL stands out as the top candidate with all four multi-signal confirmations including a volume surge, but it will be a stronger buy on a genuine risk-on day. Holding dry powder and letting existing positions run.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Holding cash is an active investment decision, not a failure to act. On neutral or low-conviction market days, keeping dry powder means you preserve capital and flexibility to buy aggressively when a genuine risk-on signal appears — such as NASDAQ up 2% or more. Forced buying on weak days often means overpaying just before a pullback.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 持有現金本身就是一種主動的投資決策，而非消極等待。在市場方向不明的橫盤日，保留充足現金代表你保持了靈活性，能夠在真正的風險偏好訊號出現時（例如納指單日上漲2%以上）果斷進場。在弱勢日強行買入，往往意味著在回調前高位建倉，得不償失。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted marginally higher on Thursday with the S&P 500 gaining 0.3% and the NASDAQ adding 0.2%, reflecting a low-conviction summer session with no major catalysts. Trading volume was subdued and sector rotation was muted, suggesting institutional participants were largely on the sidelines. The session reinforced a cautious wait-and-see posture ahead of upcoming macro data.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週四小幅收高，標普500指數上漲0.3%，納斯達克指數上升0.2%，整體走勢缺乏明確方向，顯示市場進入夏季低量整理階段。板塊輪動疲弱，機構資金普遍按兵不動，等待更多宏觀數據指引。市場呈現觀望情緒，短線趨勢方向未明。
